-PORTVERSION=	0.9.8

 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	fusefs-
 DISTNAME=	fuse-${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}

-COMMENT=	A full-featured exFAT FS implementation as a FUSE module
+COMMENT=	Full-featured exFAT FS implementation as a FUSE module
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv3
